content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Top K Frequent Elements". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/top-k-frequent-elements/
constraints: k is in the range [1, the number of unique elements in the array]
It is guaranteed that the answer is unique
You may return the answer in any order
content.inputFormat: The input will be a list of integers and an integer k, where the list represents the elements and k represents the number of top frequent elements to return.
content.outputFormat: The output will be a list of the top k frequent elements in the input list.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a hash table to count the frequency of each element, then use a heap to find the top k frequent elements.
